summary: Completed testing of Phase 1 CRM features (Teams, Leads, Programs APIs). Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All pages load correctly. Role-based access control working. Found 1 issue: TeamsDashboard.jsx uses /api/teams endpoint which returns 403 for managers (should use /api/teams/my-teams).

integration_issues.issue: TeamsDashboard.jsx always calls GET /api/teams instead of /api/teams/my-teams for managers, causing 403 error

passed_tests: Backend: Super admin login (superadmin@plan4growth.uk/password123) returns valid token with role=super_admin
Backend: Manager login (manager@plan4growth.uk/password123) returns valid token with role=manager
Backend: Sales user login (sales@plan4growth.uk/password123) returns valid token with role=sales_user
Backend: GET /api/teams returns list of teams (super_admin access)
Backend: GET /api/teams returns 403 for manager role (correct access control)
Backend: GET /api/teams/my-teams returns manager's teams
Backend: POST /api/teams creates team successfully (super_admin)
Backend: POST /api/teams returns 403 for manager (correct access control)
Backend: GET /api/leads returns list of leads with filters
Backend: GET /api/leads/stats returns lead statistics
Backend: POST /api/leads creates lead successfully
Backend: PATCH /api/leads/:leadId/status updates lead status
Backend: GET /api/leads/:leadId returns specific lead
Backend: Duplicate email rejected with 400 error
Backend: GET /api/programs returns list of programs
Backend: GET /api/programs?include_inactive=true works for admin
Backend: POST /api/programs creates program successfully (super_admin)
Backend: POST /api/programs returns 403 for manager (correct access control)
Backend: GET /api/programs/:programId returns specific program
Backend: Sales user can access leads
Backend: Sales user can create leads
Backend: Unauthenticated requests rejected with 401/403
Backend: Invalid token rejected with 401/403
Frontend: Login page loads correctly
Frontend: CRM Overview Dashboard loads with stats
Frontend: Leads Dashboard loads with table and filters
Frontend: Add Lead modal opens and form works
Frontend: Teams Dashboard loads (for super_admin)
Frontend: Programs Dashboard loads (for super_admin)
Frontend: Role-based navigation filtering works (Programs hidden for managers)
action_items: FIX: TeamsDashboard.jsx should check user role and call /api/teams/my-teams for managers instead of /api/teams
critical_code_review_comments: TeamsDashboard.jsx line 37: Always calls /api/teams regardless of user role. Should conditionally call /api/teams/my-teams for manager role.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all pages load, minor integration issue with manager Teams view)

seed_data_creation: Test leads and teams created during pytest run (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRM Phase 1 complete. APIs for Teams, Leads, Programs all working. Role-based access control working correctly on backend. Frontend TeamsDashboard needs fix to use /api/teams/my-teams for managers. Stripe and GoHighLevel remain MOCKED.

teams_api.POST /api/teams: Super admin only, creates team successfully

crm_portal_ui.overview: Shows stats for Total Leads, Interested, Conversions, Conv Rate
crm_portal_ui.leads_dashboard: Table with filtering, search, status updates, Add Lead modal
crm_portal_ui.teams_dashboard: Team cards with member count, conversion stats
crm_portal_ui.programs_dashboard: Program cards with price, duration, commission info

role_based_access.super_admin: Full access to all CRM features
role_based_access.manager: Access to Leads, Teams (own teams only), no Programs
